---
title: "Annualized Time Series"
format: 
  html:
    code-fold: true
    toc: true
    toc-location: left
    toc-depth: 3
page-layout: full
---


::: {.callout-tip title="Plots are interactive!"}
-   **To zoom in and out, reset or download the plot**, hover on the plot to see the option on the top right corner.
-   **To turn on and off data series**, click on the data series title in the legend located below each plot.
:::

## Eastern Bering

:::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="80%"}


```{r "configure region"}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| results: 'hide'


library(dplyr)
library(gt)
library(reshape2)
library(plotly)
library(magrittr)
library(lubridate)

```
 

```{r "Eastern Bering"}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false

## ANNUAL TIME SERIES PLOT ##



# Load annualized extent
annual = read.csv("data/annualized_extent_EasternBering.csv")

# Plot annual time series
fig_annual <- plot_ly(annual, type = 'scatter', mode = 'lines+markers')%>%
  add_trace(x = ~year, y = ~extent, 
            line=list(color='lightblue'),
            marker = list(color='blue', size =8))%>%
  layout(showlegend = F, title="Annualized time series(1985-2024)",
         xaxis = list(rangeslider = list(visible = T),
                      zerolinecolor = '#ffff',
                      zerolinewidth = 2,
                      gridcolor = 'ffff',
                      title="Year"),
         yaxis = list(zerolinecolor = '#ffff',
                      zerolinewidth = 2,
                      gridcolor = 'ffff',
                      title="Extent (Square km)"),
         #autosize = TRUE,
         plot_bgcolor='#e5ecf6') %>%
  config(responsive = TRUE)

# Display
fig_annual
```


### Data downloads

-   Annualized extent time series (1985-Current) [Data](data/annualized_extent_EasternBering.csv) - [Description](data/annualized_extent_README.md)


:::

::: {.column width="20%"}
![Eastern Bering](img/ebering.png){width="200px"}
:::

::::
 


## Northern Bering
:::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="80%"}

```{r "Northern Bering"}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false

## ANNUAL TIME SERIES PLOT ##



# Load annualized extent
annual = read.csv("data/annualized_extent_NorthernBering.csv")

# Plot annual time series
fig_annual <- plot_ly(annual, type = 'scatter', mode = 'lines+markers')%>%
  add_trace(x = ~year, y = ~extent, 
            line=list(color='lightblue'),
            marker = list(color='blue', size =8))%>%
  layout(showlegend = F, title="Annualized time series(1985-2024)",
         xaxis = list(rangeslider = list(visible = T),
                      zerolinecolor = '#ffff',
                      zerolinewidth = 2,
                      gridcolor = 'ffff',
                      title="Year"),
         yaxis = list(zerolinecolor = '#ffff',
                      zerolinewidth = 2,
                      gridcolor = 'ffff',
                      title="Extent (Square km)"),
         #autosize = TRUE,
         plot_bgcolor='#e5ecf6') %>%
  config(responsive = TRUE)

# Display
fig_annual
```


### Data downloads

-   Annualized extent time series (1985-Current) [Data](data/annualized_extent_NorthernBering.csv) - [Description](data/annualized_extent_README.md)



:::

::: {.column width="20%"}
![Northern Bering](img/nbering.png){width="200px"}
:::

::::

## Southeastern Bering
:::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="80%"}

```{r "Southeastern Bering"}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false

## ANNUAL TIME SERIES PLOT ##



# Load annualized extent
annual = read.csv("data/annualized_extent_SoutheasternBering.csv")

# Plot annual time series
fig_annual <- plot_ly(annual, type = 'scatter', mode = 'lines+markers')%>%
  add_trace(x = ~year, y = ~extent, 
            line=list(color='lightblue'),
            marker = list(color='blue', size =8))%>%
  layout(showlegend = F, title="Annualized time series(1985-2024)",
         xaxis = list(rangeslider = list(visible = T),
                      zerolinecolor = '#ffff',
                      zerolinewidth = 2,
                      gridcolor = 'ffff',
                      title="Year"),
         yaxis = list(zerolinecolor = '#ffff',
                      zerolinewidth = 2,
                      gridcolor = 'ffff',
                      title="Extent (Square km)"),
         #autosize = TRUE,
         plot_bgcolor='#e5ecf6') %>%
  config(responsive = TRUE)

# Display
fig_annual
```

### Data downloads

-   Annualized extent time series (1985-Current) [Data](data/annualized_extent_SoutheasternBering.csv) - [Description](data/annualized_extent_README.md)



:::

::: {.column width="20%"}
![Southeastern Bering](img/sebering.png){width="200px"}
:::

::::
## Alaskan Arctic

:::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="80%"}


```{r}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false

## ANNUAL TIME SERIES PLOT ##



# Load annualized extent
annual = read.csv("data/annualized_extent_AlaskanArctic.csv")

# Plot annual time series
fig_annual <- plot_ly(annual, type = 'scatter', mode = 'lines+markers')%>%
  add_trace(x = ~year, y = ~extent, 
            line=list(color='lightblue'),
            marker = list(color='blue', size =8))%>%
  layout(showlegend = F, title="Annualized time series(1985-2024)",
         xaxis = list(rangeslider = list(visible = T),
                      zerolinecolor = '#ffff',
                      zerolinewidth = 2,
                      gridcolor = 'ffff',
                      title="Year"),
         yaxis = list(zerolinecolor = '#ffff',
                      zerolinewidth = 2,
                      gridcolor = 'ffff',
                      title="Extent (Square km)"),
         #autosize = TRUE,
         plot_bgcolor='#e5ecf6') %>%
  config(responsive = TRUE)

# Display
fig_annual
```

### Data downloads

-   Annualized extent time series (1985-Current) [Data](data/annualized_extent_AlaskanArctic.csv) - [Description](data/annualized_extent_README.md)



:::

::: {.column width="20%"}
![Alaskan Arctic ](img/arctic.png){width="200px"}



:::

::::
